headline: Wall Street Analysts Think Workday (WDAY) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), Workday (WDAY) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: The ‘death of SaaS’ could be the best thing to ever happen to SaaS M&A
summary: While public software multiples compress, private dealmakers are feasting. 2025 was the biggest year for enterprise SaaS M&A since 2021—and the chaos isn't over yet.

headline: Workday AI Integration With AppZen May Reframe Valuation And Growth Story
summary: Workday (NasdaqGS:WDAY) has expanded its enterprise AI ecosystem with a new Design Approved Integration from AppZen. The integration brings AppZen’s AI powered autonomous expense auditing directly into the Workday platform for finance teams. AppZen’s Mastermind AI is used to review expenses, detect anomalies and fraud, and support complex compliance requirements. Workday focuses on cloud based applications for finance and human resources, and the new AppZen integration fits into its core...

headline: GitLab, Samsara, Intuit, Workday, and Autodesk Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after sentiment improved as President Trump indicated that the US was engaged in serious, productive talks with Iran.
